title: Dragon Wings
description: Plugin | Ender Dragon will drop an Elytra when defeated. Now with configurable drop placement!
body:
![Bisect Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bab445b70d606b96245d2dcb0fe9756d1f09c69.webp)
### [Use our code " withrage " to get 25% discount!](https://bisecthosting.com/withrage)
# DRAGON WINGS
**Ender Dragon** will drop **1 elytra** when defeated. This can be changed through a **configuration file**!

**Drop placement can now be also configured! Elytra can now spawn frozen above the portal, in a chest or in your inventory!**

This plugin is also available on **[Spigot](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/dragon-wings.120977/)** and **[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/bukkit-plugins/dragon-wings)**!

![Ender Dragon drops elytra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47f80698cc99a9a14842b545014439e371c6220e_0.webp)
